title: Savory Japanese Chicken Skewers
description: A savory and nostalgic Japanese dish from the Chubu region, featuring juicy chicken and a hint of orange blossom water, made satvik-friendly and served on a wooden board.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, ginger, and orange blossom water to make the marinade.
Add the chicken pieces to the marinade and mix well to coat, then cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated chicken onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill or grill pan with sesame oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the chicken skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are cooked through and slightly charred.
Serve the skewers hot on a wooden board, garnished with sliced green onions and a side of steamed vegetables if desired.
